The community

The Iron
Miles Club

One club. Not a run club, not a lifting club — the club. You run, you lift, you swim, you turn up. Everyone's welcome and nobody's behind.

How to join See the sessions
No barriers

You're already in

No membership. No fee. No "fitness level required". No application to fill in and wait on. If you can find the start point, you're a member.

€0
To join, ever
All paces
Walk · jog · race — no one dropped
Just show up
No sign-up wall
One club, three ways to move

Where we meet

The Run

Saturdays · 8:00am · the Living Bridge, University of Limerick. The anchor of the week. We set off together, we finish together, and the back of the pack matters as much as the front.

First time running? Start here. There's always someone running your pace.

The Strength

Endurance without strength breaks down. We build the engine — circuits, conditioning, the work that keeps you on the road and off the physio table.

Sessions run alongside the run club through the week. Bring nothing but yourself.

The Water

Open water is where the club goes when the lake calls — triathlon prep, cold-water resilience, and the quiet that only deep water gives you.

For the triathletes, the 70.3 hopefuls, and the curious. Wetsuit optional, nerve required.

The people

This is who shows up

Year One · Invitational
The Forge Ultra

A backyard ultra in the Cratloe Hills. 6.706km a loop, on the hour, until one is left standing. 27 September 2026.

Cratloe Hills · Co. Clare
The whole process

Follow the page for session times. Turn up on Saturday. Or send one message and we'll point you to the next meet. That's it — that's joining.

Follow @ironmilesclub Send a message
